message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve south african food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 17:15 on monday
If the booking fails how about 16:15
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should arrive by 12:15
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
